title: bellium minutum
intro: Bellium minutum, also known as dwarf bellwort or lesser bellwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apiaceae, characterized by its delicate white flowers and fern-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bellium minutum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health and relieving menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Bellium minutum include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in a solvent or by mixing the plant's extract with a carrier oil.
